---
output:
  html_document:
    theme: yeti
    highlight: tango
---

______________________________________________________________________________________

![](X:/Trans/STAFF/Reid/viz/rhaefer.github.io/images/hood.jpg)

_Approaching the Pearly Gates on Mount Hood (2016)_

______________________________________________________________________________________

![](X:/Trans/STAFF/Reid/viz/rhaefer.github.io/images/common.jpg)

_The oldest public park in the U.S. (2018)_
